title: Jaden Mans GOD Trident
description: Adds Jaden Mans God trident to your server allowing to replicate what you see on the proper server.
body:
# Overview:

This plugin adds a God Trident to your server which has many powerful abilities. The Trident could be a fun event item or a race to the mace style start to your server.

## Setting the plugin up:

This is very simple all you need to do is to drag the .jar file into the plugins folder of your 1.21.11+ server.

You can also make and install a texture pack since the custom model data of the trident is 4343.

You will also need to install a player head plugin so that you can craft the weapon. e.g. [Player Head Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/head-drops?version=1.21.11&loader=paper)

The plugin is very configurable via the config file: ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d80cc09788e022238c11ecd3f6ce5f8fe5576018.png)

### The Commands:

/poseidontrident - gives you the trident


The recipe: ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4292dc357a7d9e0b1db41c36a5f1cca5e20da277.png)
